prompt: Generate one real Codex account Image2 bitmap for a dark fantasy ARPG quest card. 16:9 horizontal cinematic painted thumbnail, no text, no watermark, no UI frame. It must be unique to this quest, not a reused map crop, not SVG, not procedural line art. Quest title: 서리 감시탑 파견. Field: 서리 감시탑. Objective mode: kill.  Show the objective as a small narrative scene with props, threats, and atmosphere. Readable when downscaled to 256x144, premium Diablo-like grime, strong light/dark composition.
